feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: i want to be a virgin killer
entry.content: I cannot wait to take my cute KHHV anon's virginity!!! im so excited i hope he likes me, what should i do to make the experience more enjoyable for him idk what incels like...

entry.title: /int/ International: Russian socialism was incredibly conservative after Stalin came to power. Wester…
entry.content: Russian socialism was incredibly conservative after Stalin came to power. Western society was much, much, much, much more liberal in its customs than the Soviet Union. Abortion was prohibited in the USSR, gays were persecuted, and men could beat their wives and the Soviet state would do nothing.

He is from a dead show and you recognize him. Homelander, Vader, Joker, allmost all Ryan Gosling characters all chud coded and huge hits. pander to the disaffected male audience for $$$ you jews.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Now that I’ve been off /b/ for a while, I thought I could walk anonymously throu…
entry.content: Now that I’ve been off /b/ for a while, I thought I could walk anonymously through a store. It worked at first, but then someone yelled, “Hey, it’s Andy Sixx!” Then I was surrounded by people. “How are you?” “We miss you!” It was a bit of a circus. I’m almost sorry I yelled.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Jazz is Shit
entry.content: I was listening to Bitches Brew by Miles Davis. More like Shit's Poo. Just endless solos like in prog rock. Electric guitars playing randomly instead of epic riffs. And this is considered one of the best. Utterly insane. John McLaughlin makes me LAUGH with how shit he is. I also listened to My Favorite Things by John Coltrane, just the same 2 minutes over and over. And this was acclaimed? I thought maybe these are just two bad selections. I listened to Kind of Blue and it was just nonsense, no r

entry.title: /int/ International: >no tenses >no gendered noun >no plural forms >no definite/indefinite articles >…
entry.content: >no tenses >no gendered noun >no plural forms >no definite/indefinite articles >consistent verbs >consistent pronunciation >simple, almost non-existent grammar >SVO order >phonetic language >uses Latin script >many loanwords from other popular language >an official language of the UNESCO's general conference >spoken by 300 million people Why haven't you learn Bahasa Indonesia yet?

entry.title: /int/ International: Is Brazil the most pathetic cuck soccer playing nation in the world? When other …
entry.content: Is Brazil the most pathetic cuck soccer playing nation in the world? When other teams lose you’re either not surprised or feel bad for them, but with Brazil you can’t help but laugh. I think it’s about time Brazilians start identifying with the DBZ character who best represents them and hand Goku over to a team that deserve him.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Of all the real, proven threats to humanity, none of them have killed as many pe…
entry.content: Of all the real, proven threats to humanity, none of them have killed as many people as government itself. In academia, it's known as democide. But notice, you've probably never heard that, even if you went to college. And you've certainly never seen it on the news or on the Discovery Channel. "Oh no, they're too busy telling you about sharks. They're going to get you any minute with Shark Week and Bin Laden and... We gotta stick our hands down your pants." No, you never hear about democide, and

entry.content: It was from some Christian Jewish program. It shows a lady (interviewer) crying with a poor old Ukrainian woman. Donate now to help feed the people in Ukraine." >cues to the old ukrainian woman >I am old, I am jewish, please help us, we have no food, the bombs fall every day and it scares us jews Announcer: >we need to save the jews of ukraine, help us save the Jewish population today What t

entry.title: /mu/ Music: DAMON ALBARN GETS UNCLE ACID KICKED OUT OF ROSKILDE FESTIVAL FOR PLAYING TOO LOUD
entry.content: "Apologies to everyone who came to Roskilde festival hoping to see us play a full set last night. Pop diva Damon Albarn of the novelty cartoon act Gorillaz threw a hissy fit while we played, threatened to storm off stage before finally getting our set shut down because we were "too loud". They were the only headliner of the whole weekend who couldn't cope with playing at the same time as other artists.Unfortunately we only managed 25 minutes of assaulting his precious ears from our stage half a

entry.content: The ACTUALLY REAL one edition. Previous: >>83850991 BFDIE Full Season: https://youtu.be/2andF8GEmC8 > What are Object Shows? Object Shows are web animations unfortunately lacking in completion with characters based on everyday items. They often compete in challenges with humor, drama, and quirky personalities. entry.title: /v/ Video Games: She’s being made into a scapegoat for doing what needs to be done. Microsoft’s g…
entry.content: She’s being made into a scapegoat for doing what needs to be done. Microsoft’s gaming division is unsustainable as is. They acquired way too many studios too quickly and became too bloated. Someone, somewhere had to make cuts eventually, she just ended up being the fall girl

entry.title: /o/ Auto: In what YEAR do you estimate Mercedes will stop producing shitty interiors? >why…
entry.content: In what YEAR do you estimate Mercedes will stop producing shitty interiors? >why did this happen well, adjusted for inflation Mercedes are actually cheaper than before by a significant margin, especially the volume upper models like e and s class, but that's only in Europe and North America. I think in the Middle East, Asia and Africa there are zany tariffs and other fees that can tack on 50k+ to the price of these cars so the real price is much higher and presumably such customers are more conc

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Static site + GitHub repo critique
entry.content: Built a static project site for an open-source Blender model/source release. Looking for technical critique: does the site explain the project fast enough, does the GitHub repo look credible, is the source-release CTA obvious, and does anything about the presentation look scammy/vaporware? Site: https://highfrontierlogistics.com/ Repo: https://github.com/highfrontierlogi stics/orbital-tender Not asking for praise — what would make you immediately close the tab?

entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8358 Green and Red Flags Edition Previous Thread: >>83904775 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise thei

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Do you feel that Ween reached their full musical potential in their careers? The…
entry.content: Do you feel that Ween reached their full musical potential in their careers? They don't have a bad album in my opinion: The Mollusk and Quebec are classics. Yet if they weren't plagued by personal demons, could they have reached a greater zenith? Perhaps it just wouldn't be Ween anymore if they weren't, in some parts, slacker degenerates.

entry.content: "I think there is a resurgence of antipolonism because at this moment gojżyn have not yet learned how to be based and redpilled incel chuds. And I think we [Lechites] are going to be part of the [leading] role, of [leading] Europe into this chudcel world. But again, there must be a transition and the transition will not be easy. And I think that the Poles will be at the center of that. It’s a huge transformation for Europe to make. They are now going into a based and redpilled chud ethno-nationa
